description: A flex-wrap image grid. Use for client logo strips (no labels) or icon-category tiles (with labels). Items always have an image; labels are optional.

id.description: Optional HTML id attribute for anchor linking (e.g. navigation anchors).

title.description: Optional section heading above the grid.

variant.description: Background presentation. 'default' = page background. 'dark' = surface background with borders. 'inverted' = inverted background for strong contrast.

items.description: Array of image items. Each: { image_url: string, image_alt: string, label?: string }. Omit label for pure logo display; include label for icon+category tiles.

image_alt.description: Alt text. Use the logo or category name; empty string only for decorative images.

label.description: Text label below the image. Omit for logo-only rows.
